title: pilosella stellata
intro: Pilosella stellata, also known as moon daisy, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family that belongs to the genus Pilosella, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and hairy stems. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Pilosella stellata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in infusions and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
